zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Glanville於1146年出生時，她的父親Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England27歲，母親Bertha Valoines17歲。她於大約1170年與Roger de Tudenham在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1173年享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Glanville于1146年出生时，她的父亲Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England27岁，母亲Bertha Valoines17岁。她于大约1170年与Roger de Tudenham在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1173年享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Glanville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): of Norman origin, a habitational name from a place so called in Calvados, France, named from an ancient Germanic personal name of uncertain form and meaning + Old French ville ‘settlement’. This name has frequently been confused with Glanfield, a habitational name from Glanvill Farm in Devon, Clanville in Somerset and Hampshire, or Clanfield in Hampshire, or from some other place likewise named with Old English clǣne ‘clean’ (i.e. free of brambles and undergrowth) + feld ‘pasture, open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Glanville was born in 1146, her father, Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England, was 27 and her mother, Bertha Valoines, was 17. She married Roger de Tudenham about 1170, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1173, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Glanville est née en 1146, son père, Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Bertha Valoines, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Tudenham environ 1170, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1173, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Glanville 1146 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England 27 und ihre Mutter Bertha Valoines 17. Sie hat um 1170 in Norfolk, England Roger de Tudenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1173 im Alter von 27 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Glanville è nata il nel 1146, sua padre, Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Bertha Valoines, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Tudenham circa 1170, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1173, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Glanvilleが1146年に生まれた時，父Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of Englandは27歳，母Bertha Valoinesは17歳であった。約1170年にイギリスノーフォルクでRoger de Tudenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1173年に27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Glanville(이)가 1146년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertha Valoines(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1170년 영국 노르폴크에서 Roger de Tudenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1173년 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Glanville nasceu em 1146, seu pai, Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Bertha Valoines, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Tudenham aproximadamente 1170, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1173, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Glanville родилась в 1146 г., её отцу по имени Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertha Valoines, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Tudenham около 1170 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1173 г. в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Glanville nació en 1146, su papá, Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Bertha Valoines, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Roger de Tudenham aproximadamente 1170, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1173, a la edad de 27 años.
